creator: shss@pos-k.ru
text:
I install mgetty-1.1.33 from ports FreeBSD 6.0-RELEASE and see into
log of mgetty.cuad1
---------------------
09/19 15:32:39 ad1 mgetty: interim release 1.1.33-Apr10 
09/19 15:32:39 ad1 check for lockfiles 
09/19 15:32:39 ad1 locking the line 
09/19 15:32:40 ad1 mod: cannot make /dev/cuad1 stdin: Bad file descriptor 
09/19 15:32:40 ad1 open device /dev/cuad1 failed: Bad file descriptor
--------------------- 
On FreeBSD 5.4-RELEASE, but with cuaa1 device all work correctly? What is wrong?
